since_last: 56% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +2.15% · Gold +2.69% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 56% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.29%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.29%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -4.83%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -22.40%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +7.24%, LSCC +7.22%, AMAT +6.65%, KLAC +6.49%, LRCX +5.93%. Laggards: IBM -22.40%, WDAY -9.85%, NOW -7.51%, INTU -6.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.87% at $140.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
